title: Monoalphabetic Cipher Encryption and Decryption Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of encrypting a plaintext message and decrypting a ciphertext using a monoalphabetic substitution cipher with a fixed key.
relationships: Define Substitution Alphabet (Key) -> Input Plaintext Message
Input Plaintext Message -> Encrypt: Substitute each letter
Encrypt: Substitute each letter -> Output Ciphertext
Input Ciphertext -> Decrypt: Reverse substitute each letter
Decrypt: Reverse substitute each letter -> Output Original Plaintext
